scripts.build: npm run nearleyc && npm run tsc
scripts.test: npm run build && echo starting... && node --enable-source-maps dist/index.js test/m6502.converted.asm > test/m6502.converted.json; echo done rc=$?
scripts.test-converter: npm run build && node --enable-source-maps test/convert.js test/m6502.asm test/m6502.converted.asm
